text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
ruпљЮ ruruпљЮвЩ™ 
The spring breeze is so softвА¶вА¶вЩ™

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: вАФвАФOh? Up so earlyвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: K.S. Miracle
text_block_list.text:
HmmвА¶вА¶ so these discs contain footage of best date pairsвА¶вА¶ 
Maybe I should take the photo album tooвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Miracle-san. 
Are you up this early because of committee work?

text_block_list.name: K.S. Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Zephyr. 
This isвА¶вА¶ just something personal.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
PersonalвА¶вА¶? 
Are thoseвА¶вА¶ from past Droite's?

text_block_list.name: K.S. Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I wanted to get some materials for Ruby. 
вА¶вА¶She's working really hard to get "best date."

text_block_list.name: K.S. Miracle
text_block_list.text:
From early morning to late at nightвА¶вА¶ Even between her 
busy schedule, she practices dancing. вАФвАФfully dedicated.

text_block_list.name: K.S. Miracle
text_block_list.text:
That's why, I want to help. 
Hopefully these materials help in some way.

text_block_list.name: K.S. Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if you're interested Zephyr, 
Shall I compile some for you as well?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
No thanksвА¶вА¶ 
I'm going to leave it to Yamase winds, so it's fine.

text_block_list.name: K.S. Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Really? Well if you have any other 
questions or concerns, just let me know.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. ButвА¶вА¶ what I'm most concerned about, 
is how busy you've been, Miracle-san.

text_block_list.name: K.S. Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, don't worry about me. 
In fact, I'm just happy to help.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: вАФвАФвА¶вА¶.

text_block_list.name: K.S. Miracle
text_block_list.text:
вАФвАФOh. well, look at the timeвА¶вА¶ Sorry, I have 
some committee work to do so, I'll see you later.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶You're like a light breeze, frustrating. вАФвАФNever changing.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
(She always puts others before herselfвА¶вА¶ 
Always offering her hand to me.)

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
(No matter how much you play it off, prioritizing someone else. 
No matter how much burden you put on yourself helping others.)

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
(You still hide it behind a soft, light breezeвА¶вА¶ 
saying it's for "someone else")

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
(вА¶вА¶I wonder, if Miracle-san will give up on herself 
вА¶вА¶for "someone else")

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: вАФвАФWhere are "you"вА¶вА¶?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ah, ZephachiпљЮпЉБпЉБ

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hey hey, could you listen to this? 
SoвА¶? BadвА¶?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: WellвА¶вА¶it sounds like a sandstorm.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
RightгГЉ! Violin's stupid hard!! Guess I should do something elseпљЮ? 
I thought the Princess would like the violin though.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: You wanted to play for Ruby-san?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I really wanna be her date! I'm tryna really show offвЩ°! 
Anyway I'll try something else! If you think of a cool instrument, 
lemme know!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: вАФвАФShe's very honest about what she wants.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: If only Miracle-sanвА¶вА¶ could have a little bit of thatвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: K.S. Miracle
text_block_list.text:
So, would you like to take a look at the committee's costume 
rentals now? There's even more variations this year.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Yes, please. 
I'll decide whether or not to rent one afterwards.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Costume variations are nice but, 
Some variations in the planning would be nice tooпљЮ.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: вАФвАФhm? Is there someone over there!?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: вА¶вА¶What are you doing, Helios?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
BamchamпљЮ! y'see, right now, 
operation Lovey вЩ° Dovey Princess's best date is underwayпљЮ! !

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: BestвА¶вА¶what?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Best dateпљЮ y'know, absolute win? 
Think! I'mma try it again!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I even sent out a serious invitation. For sure this time! 
My lady will fall in love with me!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I seeвА¶вА¶ 
Well, in that case I'll watchвАФвАФ

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
вАФвАФI have received your invitation. I have about 15 minutes until 
my next appointment, but I will hear what you have to say.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: PrincessпљЮпљЮ! ! You came! ? I'm so happyпљЮпљЮ! !

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
Normally, I would ask you to contact me in advance, 
but I happened to have an open slot today.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wha? Isn't that called Destiny! ? 
Alright, let's goгГЉгГЉ! !
(PooпљЮпљЮPoopoopooпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮPoopeeeпљЮпљЮ!!)

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
PwaaпљЮпљЮ! So! ? 
Everyone's staring at meвШЖ

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I think it's a different kind of stare! ?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I mean, standing out's good! 
AndгГїnowгГїhere'sпљЮпљЮ? ? Exciting daпљЮпљЮnce! !

text_block_list.name: K.S. Miracle
text_block_list.text: AhhahaпљЮ, you definitely stand out a lotвА¶вА¶!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: RightпљЮ! ? Best date material right! ?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: No hang on, getting best date's tough!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: fufufu. So how about a "fun award" instead?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Eh! Can't we win both!? 
Hey, Princess, you can get best date withвАФвАФвАФвАФ

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text: That seems to be impossible.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
I'm very sorry, 
but I have to be somewhere soon, please excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Eh! ? W-wait, wait wait wait! ! 
Rejected again! ? What'd I do wrong! ?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: PRINCESSгГЉгГЉгГЉгГЉ! !
